headline: KKR Targets AI Infrastructure And Advisory Growth With Helix And Crowe
summary: KKR (NYSE:KKR) has launched Helix Digital Infrastructure, a US$10 billion venture focused on AI-oriented data centers with partners including Nvidia, Kuwait Investment Authority, and Vistra. Helix will be led by former AWS CEO Adam Selipsky and is positioned to develop and operate large-scale digital infrastructure for AI workloads. KKR has also agreed to a major equity investment in Crowe Advisory LLC, becoming the firm’s first institutional capital partner. Crowe Advisory is one of the...

headline: Barclays Agrees to Acquire GoHenry U.K. Unit, Boost Youth Banking
summary: BCS is buying GoHenry's U.K. business to deepen youth banking ties, adding more than 500,000 young users while keeping the app's brand intact.
